name: Pinenibbles
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple juice into a saucepan and add half of the pineapple.
2. Stir in the gelatin until softened.
3. Heat over low heat, stirring occasionally, until the gelatin is melted.
4. Add honey and lemon juice, if desired, and the remaining pineapple; mix well.
5. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square nonstick cake pan.
6. Chill until firm.
7. Cut into 1-inch squares.
8. Store in the refrigerator.
